question: How many days did it take for me to receive the new remote shutter release after I ordered it?
ground_truth_answer: 5 days. 6 days (including the last day) is also acceptable.

retrieval_results.context:
User ordered a new remote shutter release online
User's new remote shutter release is working well
User ordered a new remote shutter release online on 2025-02-05 after losing the previous one
User lost remote shutter release on February 5
